family.title: MZ-CC.HANDDRAWN procedural animation + audio system
family.summary: A hand-drawn paper-field network whose jittering colored structures, hard masks, camera crops, dub synthesis, and mid-point sonic narrator evolve as one synchronized audiovisual instrument.

provenance.conversation_title: Hand-drawn branch network / procedural audiovisual system
provenance.source_notes: Recovered from an iterative procedural creative-coding conversation. Reference videos are web-optimized copies of the approved conversation renders; the generator reconstructs the family logic rather than claiming bit-identical reproduction of every historical render.
